description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a before_script that runs bundle install --path vendor and caches the vendor/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test/, saves the test/ folder as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public/, publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
